data.title: Write documentation polyglot compliance test (RED)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/docs/test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh with 3 test functions verifying the polyglot documentation compliance contract:

1. test_review_workflow_config_ref_generic — Find the Config Reference section in REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md. Assert that the commands.lint and commands.type_check bullet items do NOT contain 'make lint-ruff' or 'make lint-mypy' as default values. Assert that generic/parameterized references ARE present (e.g., 'configured lint command' or similar).
2. test_review_workflow_commands_generic — Find the numbered Lint check and Type check items in REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 1. Assert they do NOT contain hardcoded 'make lint-ruff' or 'make lint-mypy'. Assert they DO contain config key references (e.g., '$commands.lint' or 'commands.lint' or 'configured').
3. test_dependency_guidance_audit_tools — Assert DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md contains a Security Audit Commands section (or equivalent heading). Assert the section contains entries for all three tools: (a) pip-audit with 'pip-audit --strict', (b) npm audit with 'npm audit --audit-level=moderate', (c) bundle-audit with 'bundle-audit check --update'.

Use content-anchored section detection (awk/sed on section headings), NOT absolute line numbers.

This test FAILS (RED) on current codebase because REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md contains 'make lint-ruff'/'make lint-mypy' and DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md has no audit tools section.

## Files to Modify
- tests/docs/test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add RED markers and mappings for REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md and DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file tests/docs/test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh
- [ ] Test contains at least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Test FAILS (exit non-zero) on current codebase
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh
- [ ] .test-index maps REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md to test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh
  Verify: grep 'REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-doc-polyglot-compliance'
- [ ] .test-index maps DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md to test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh
  Verify: grep 'DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-doc-polyglot-compliance'
- [ ] .test-index contains RED markers
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_review_workflow_config_ref_generic\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
